thought: Blend the scraped reference video by borrowing only its execution style: fixed camera, low-amplitude chibi bobbing, subtle elastic rebound, UI-led rhythm, and short promotional pulse beats. Because the first frame is a promotional splash rather than active gameplay, the sequence should strictly continue from that frozen hero key visual instead of inventing a new battle scene. I preserve the original diagonal composition, center character cluster, lower-right promo text block, and right-side UI emphasis from the first frame. The motion is built as gentle layered parallax and suspended VFX activation, then escalates into a lightweight battle-feel through readable floating hit text and candy-color impact sparkles without breaking the promo layout. I use slow, continuous motion to maintain anatomy and silhouette stability, and apply cartoon physics feedback as bounce, recoil, glow pulse, and brief shockwave accents rather than realistic combat knockback. The reference video informs the timing and feedback cadence, while the first frame fully determines subject placement, scene logic, and event flow.
prompt_en: First Frame: @487953ff126ec25f423c51169d2fb1e3.png. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774793752.mp4. Motion Style Reference: use the reference only for fixed-camera mobile game presentation, low-amplitude idle bobbing, elastic UI pulse, subtle layer drift, and short readable feedback beats; do not copy any unrelated story action. Strictly preserve the original promotional-art composition, diagonal flow from left-to-right and downward toward the lower-right text block, center character cluster, bottom supporting elements, and right-side promo UI placement. Quirky cartoon meme-defense style, bright saturated chibi fantasy comedy, clean outlines, candy-color VFX, readable layered motion, 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, no jitter, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement. [00s-02s] (Background Layer) Hold the exact splash composition from @487953ff126ec25f423c51169d2fb1e3.png, add very subtle parallax depth only, with the background drifting almost imperceptibly along the same diagonal axis. (Character/Action Layer) Animate the central airborne chibi cluster using @central_chibi_idle_bounce_sheet_221645.png with gentle synchronized floating, tiny vertical bob, slight accessory follow-through, and soft squash-and-return. Use @side_characters_drift_sheet_221816.png for smaller side characters to drift a few pixels outward then settle back, keeping relative positions locked. (VFX Layer) Activate suspended elemental effects from @fire_water_suspended_vfx_sheet_221733.png: the flame arc flickers forward in place and the water splash ripples downward without changing the overall layout. (UI Layer) Keep all logos and lower-right Chinese reward text locked and readable. [02s-04s] (Background Layer) Maintain fixed camera, no cinematic pan, only a faint poster-like depth separation. (Character/Action Layer) The center cluster performs a second soft bounce with slightly staggered timing to create lively promo energy, still frozen in the same heroic arrangement. (VFX Layer) Add tiny candy-color spark pulses from @impact_spark_shockwave_vfx_222023.png at weapon tips and collision points inside the center knot, each pulse expanding then fading with cartoon elasticity. (UI Layer) Introduce playful floating emphasis text from @battle_float_text_ui_221855.png near the central action, appearing as brief celebratory battle-style pop text that rises slightly and dissolves, enhancing action flavor without converting the scene into full gameplay. [04s-06s] (Background Layer) Preserve the original scene anchors and diagonal visual flow. (Character/Action Layer) Side mascots and supporting figures drift subtly along the left and lower edges using @side_characters_drift_sheet_221816.png, reinforcing the swirl toward the lower-right block. (VFX Layer) Fire and water suspended effects briefly intensify, then a small rounded shockwave ring from @impact_spark_shockwave_vfx_222023.png blooms at the center and dissipates quickly, suggesting impact energy while keeping the poster composition intact. (UI Layer) The lower-right promo block begins a soft glow pulse using @promo_cta_glow_ui_221939.png, with a gentle scale-up then return, matching the reference video’s click-feedback rhythm. [06s-08s] (Background Layer) Continue static promo framing with only micro parallax. (Character/Action Layer) Central heroes settle into a final buoyant hover loop, expressions sharp and readable, costumes consistent with the first frame. (VFX Layer) Add one last clean sparkle pass over the suspended elemental arc, with short-lived bright edges and particle dissipation. (UI Layer) The lower-right CTA glow strengthens once, then stabilizes; optional small highlight sweep across the text and reward area, keeping all typography fixed in place and legible. End on a polished promotional battle tableau that feels alive but still strictly based on the original first-frame key visual.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @487953ff126ec25f423c51169d2fb1e3.png。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774793752.mp4。动作风格参考: 仅提取参考视频中的固定机位手游展示感、低幅度待机起伏、弹性回弹、轻量UI脉冲、分层微漂移与短节奏反馈，不照搬其中具体剧情动作。严格保持首图的宣传主视觉构图、从左向右并向右下汇聚的对角线动势、中心角色团、底部辅助元素、右侧宣传文案与奖励区位置不变。整体为梦境护卫队的魔性卡通宣传战斗氛围：高饱和糖果色、Q版夸张表情、清晰描边、花哨但可读的特效、轻松解压的搞笑战斗感，4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, no jitter，stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement。[00s-02s]（背景层）以 @487953ff126ec25f423c51169d2fb1e3.png 原构图原地起动，背景只做极轻微视差，沿首图相同对角线方向产生几乎不可察觉的层次漂移。（角色/动作层）使用 @central_chibi_idle_bounce_sheet_221645.png 让中央腾空Q版角色团进行轻柔同步悬浮、细小上下bob、饰品二级跟随和软弹回位；使用 @side_characters_drift_sheet_221816.png 让边缘小角色做少量像素级外扩漂移再回位，严格锁定相对站位。（特效层）调用 @fire_water_suspended_vfx_sheet_221733.png，让悬停火焰弧线在原位轻微前闪，让水花向下产生层叠波纹，但不改变整体布局。（UI层）所有logo与右下中文奖励文案保持锁定、清晰、稳定。[02s-04s]（背景层）维持固定镜头，不做真实运镜，仅保留海报式景深层次。（角色/动作层）中央角色团做第二次更有节奏的柔和起伏，时间略微错峰，形成轻手游宣传页的活泼感，但仍保持首图英雄式定格关系。（特效层）使用 @impact_spark_shockwave_vfx_222023.png，在武器端点和中心碰撞区叠加糖果色小火花与微型冲击亮点，短暂放大后弹性消退。（UI层）使用 @battle_float_text_ui_221855.png，在中央动作区附近加入短暂的战斗感飘字，向上轻轻浮起后淡出，只增强“战斗气氛”，不把宣传图硬改成正式实机战斗。[04s-06s]（背景层）继续保持首图锚点与对角线视觉流向不变。（角色/动作层）边缘吉祥物和辅助角色使用 @side_characters_drift_sheet_221816.png 沿左侧与下缘做轻微顺势漂移，强化向右下文案区汇聚的旋流感。（特效层）火与水的悬浮元素短暂增强亮度，然后用 @impact_spark_shockwave_vfx_222023.png 在中心生成一圈小型圆润冲击波，快速扩散并消散，传达卡通化受力反馈而不破坏海报构图。（UI层）使用 @promo_cta_glow_ui_221939.png 让右下宣传奖励区开始柔和发光脉冲，轻微放大后回弹，节奏参考视频中的按钮反馈感。[06s-08s]（背景层）继续保持稳定宣传构图，仅保留极轻微分层视差。（角色/动作层）中央角色进入最终轻盈悬停循环，表情清楚、服装稳定、角色关系与首图一致。（特效层）对悬停的火水元素做最后一次干净高光闪烁与短暂粒子消散，让画面更有“活着的宣传图”质感。（UI层）右下CTA发光再增强一次后稳定，可加入一条轻微高光扫过文案和奖励区域，所有文字保持原位清晰可读。结尾停留在一个严格基于首图、但具有轻量战斗呼吸感与推广号召力的动态宣传战斗画面。
